requirements.title: Zone::to_string returns unique human-readable name
requirements.text: rcp::to_string(Zone) shall return a unique, non-empty, human-readable string for each defined Zone constant. Two distinct Zone constants shall never return the same string.

requirements.title: Zone::Unknown has value 0
requirements.text: Zone::Unknown shall have the numeric value 0, making it the zero value of the Zone type and a safe default for uninitialized variables.

requirements.title: Zone::FrontLeft has value 1
requirements.text: Zone::FrontLeft shall have the numeric value 1.

requirements.title: Zone::FrontRight has value 2
requirements.text: Zone::FrontRight shall have the numeric value 2.

requirements.title: Zone::RearLeft has value 3
requirements.text: Zone::RearLeft shall have the numeric value 3.

requirements.title: Zone::RearRight has value 4
requirements.text: Zone::RearRight shall have the numeric value 4.

requirements.title: Zone::Central has value 5
requirements.text: Zone::Central shall have the numeric value 5.

requirements.title: All named Zone constants are distinct
requirements.text: Zone::FrontLeft, Zone::FrontRight, Zone::RearLeft, Zone::RearRight, and Zone::Central shall each have a different numeric value from every other named zone constant.

requirements.title: Priority::Normal has value 0
requirements.text: Priority::Normal shall have the numeric value 0, making it the zero value of Priority and the safe default for Command fields left unset.

requirements.title: Priority::High is greater than Priority::Normal
requirements.text: The numeric value of Priority::High shall be strictly greater than Priority::Normal.

requirements.title: Priority::Critical is greater than Priority::High
requirements.text: The numeric value of Priority::Critical shall be strictly greater than Priority::High.

requirements.title: CommandType::Noop has value 0
requirements.text: CommandType::Noop shall have the numeric value 0. An uninitialized Command.type shall be interpreted as a safe no-op.

requirements.title: CommandType::Set has value 1
requirements.text: CommandType::Set shall have the numeric value 1.

requirements.title: CommandType::Get has value 2
requirements.text: CommandType::Get shall have the numeric value 2.

requirements.title: CommandType::Reset has value 3
requirements.text: CommandType::Reset shall have the numeric value 3.

requirements.title: CommandType::Watchdog has value 4
requirements.text: CommandType::Watchdog shall have the numeric value 4. The watchdog kick command shall be a stable, named constant.

requirements.title: All CommandType constants are distinct
requirements.text: CommandType::Noop, Set, Get, Reset, and Watchdog shall each have a different numeric value.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::to_string returns unique human-readable name
requirements.text: rcp::to_string(ResponseStatus) shall return a unique, non-empty, human-readable string for each defined ResponseStatus constant.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::OK has value 0
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::OK shall have the numeric value 0. An uninitialized Response.status shall be interpreted as success.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::Error has value 1
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::Error shall have the numeric value 1.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::Timeout has value 2
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::Timeout shall have the numeric value 2.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus::Busy has value 3
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::Busy shall have the numeric value 3.

requirements.title: All ResponseStatus constants are distinct
requirements.text: ResponseStatus::OK, Error, Timeout, Busy, and Unknown shall each have a different numeric value.

requirements.title: ErrClosed is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrClosed shall evaluate to true in a boolean context so callers can distinguish it from a default (zero) error_code.

requirements.title: ErrNotFound is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrNotFound shall be truthy.

requirements.title: ErrAlreadyExists is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrAlreadyExists shall be truthy.

requirements.title: ErrTimeout is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrTimeout shall be truthy.

requirements.title: ErrBusy is truthy
requirements.text: The sentinel error ErrBusy shall be truthy.

requirements.title: All sentinel errors are mutually distinct
requirements.text: ErrClosed, ErrNotFound, ErrAlreadyExists, ErrTimeout, ErrBusy, and ErrZoneMismatch shall all be distinct std::error_code values (different value or category).

requirements.title: ErrClosed detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned by a closed Controller or Registry shall compare equal to ErrClosed. Callers must be able to detect closed-entity conditions without parsing error strings.

requirements.title: ErrNotFound detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned for a missing zone lookup shall compare equal to ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: ErrAlreadyExists detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned for a duplicate zone registration shall compare equal to ErrAlreadyExists.

requirements.title: ErrTimeout detectable by value comparison
requirements.text: Any error_code returned due to a context deadline expiry shall compare equal to ErrTimeout.

requirements.title: ErrZoneMismatch is a distinct truthy sentinel error
requirements.text: ErrZoneMismatch shall be truthy and distinct from all other sentinel errors so callers can detect zone-misrouting without parsing error strings.

requirements.title: Zero-value Command is a safe no-op
requirements.text: A zero-initialised Command shall have zone=Zone::Unknown, type=CommandType::Noop, and priority=Priority::Normal.

requirements.title: Command.payload may be empty
requirements.text: Command.payload shall be optional; an empty payload shall be accepted by any Controller::send implementation without error or crash.

requirements.title: Response.command_id echoes the originating Command.id
requirements.text: Controller::send shall return a Response whose command_id field equals the id field of the submitted Command.

requirements.title: Response.zone identifies the zone that processed the command
requirements.text: Controller::send shall return a Response whose zone field equals the Zone of the Controller that processed the command.

requirements.title: Zero-value Response has ResponseStatus::OK
requirements.text: A zero-initialised Response shall have status=ResponseStatus::OK (value 0).

requirements.title: Status.zone identifies the publishing controller
requirements.text: Every Status published by a Controller shall carry a zone field equal to the Controller's declared zone.

requirements.title: Status.seq is monotonically increasing
requirements.text: Each successive Status published by a given Controller instance shall have a seq value strictly greater than the previous one.

requirements.title: Status.healthy is true while the controller is open
requirements.text: A Status published by a Controller that has not yet been closed shall carry healthy=true.

requirements.title: Status.payload carries the bytes passed to publish
requirements.text: Status.payload in every delivered Status update shall be byte-for-byte identical to the payload argument supplied to the publish call that produced it.

requirements.title: Status.payload may be empty
requirements.text: publish shall accept an empty payload without error or crash. The resulting Status.payload shall be empty.

requirements.title: Controller::send returns StatusOK with no handler
requirements.text: When no Handler is configured, Controller::send shall return a Response with status=ResponseStatus::OK.

requirements.title: Controller::send dispatches to the configured handler
requirements.text: When a Handler is configured, Controller::send shall invoke the handler exactly once per send call and return the handler's Response.

requirements.title: Controller::send rejected after close
requirements.text: Controller::send called after Controller::close shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Controller::send respects an already-done context
requirements.text: If the Context passed to Controller::send is already done at call time, send shall return ErrTimeout without invoking the handler.

requirements.title: Controller::close is idempotent
requirements.text: Controller::close shall be safe to call multiple times. Every call after the first shall return a success error_code without side effects.

requirements.title: Published Status is delivered to all active subscribers
requirements.text: A Status produced by publish shall be received by every channel returned by an active subscribe call on the same controller.

requirements.title: Subscribe channels are closed when the controller closes
requirements.text: When Controller::close is called, all channels previously returned by subscribe shall be closed.

requirements.title: Subscribe rejected after close
requirements.text: Controller::subscribe called after Controller::close shall return ErrClosed. No channel shall be returned.

requirements.title: Controller::zone returns the declared zone
requirements.text: Controller::zone shall return the Zone value provided at construction time for the lifetime of the controller.

requirements.title: Subscribe seq values are strictly increasing
requirements.text: Successive Status updates received on a subscribe channel shall carry strictly increasing seq values.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel is closed when its context is done
requirements.text: When the Context passed to subscribe becomes done, the channel returned by that subscribe call shall be closed.

requirements.title: Multiple concurrent subscribers each receive published Status
requirements.text: When multiple subscribe calls are active on the same controller, each returned channel shall independently receive every Status published via publish.

requirements.title: CommandType::Noop is accepted without error
requirements.text: Controller::send with Command.type=CommandType::Noop shall return ResponseStatus::OK and shall not return an error.

requirements.title: CommandType::Watchdog is accepted without error
requirements.text: Controller::send with Command.type=CommandType::Watchdog shall return ResponseStatus::OK and shall not return an error.

requirements.title: CommandType::Reset is accepted without error
requirements.text: Controller::send with Command.type=CommandType::Reset shall return ResponseStatus::OK and shall not return an error.

requirements.title: Handler Response is returned verbatim
requirements.text: When a Handler is configured, the Response returned by the handler shall be returned directly by Controller::send without modification.

requirements.title: Publish on a closed controller does not crash
requirements.text: Calling publish on a controller after Controller::close shall not throw or crash.

requirements.title: Concurrent send calls are data-race free
requirements.text: Multiple concurrent calls to Controller::send on the same controller shall be free of data races.

requirements.title: Concurrent publish and subscribe are data-race free
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to publish and subscribe on the same controller shall be free of data races.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel carries the correct Zone
requirements.text: Every Status received on a subscribe channel shall carry a zone field equal to the subscribing Controller's zone.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel carries correct Payload
requirements.text: Status.payload on each received update shall be byte-for-byte identical to the payload argument of the publish call that produced it.

requirements.title: Subscribe channel carries healthy=true for open controller
requirements.text: Status.healthy shall be true on every update published while the controller is open.

requirements.title: Done context does not invoke handler
requirements.text: If the Context passed to send is already done, the Handler shall not be invoked.

requirements.title: Send with empty payload does not crash
requirements.text: Controller::send with an empty Command.payload shall not throw or crash.

requirements.title: Controller::send rejects commands whose zone does not match the controller zone
requirements.text: Controller::send shall return ErrZoneMismatch when cmd.zone does not equal the zone declared by the controller.

requirements.title: Controller::send copies Command.payload before passing to the handler
requirements.text: Controller::send shall copy Command.payload before invoking the handler. Subsequent modification of the original payload by the caller shall not affect the bytes seen by the handler.

requirements.title: Controller::publish copies the payload before embedding in Status
requirements.text: Controller::publish shall copy the payload argument before embedding it in the Status value delivered to subscribers.

requirements.title: new_registry pre-populates all five standard zones
requirements.text: A Registry returned by mock::new_registry shall contain controllers for Zone::FrontLeft, FrontRight, RearLeft, RearRight, and Central.

requirements.title: Duplicate zone registration returns ErrAlreadyExists
requirements.text: Registry::register_ctrl for a zone that already has a registered controller shall return ErrAlreadyExists.

requirements.title: Deregister removes the zone and closes its controller
requirements.text: Registry::deregister shall remove the controller for the given zone and call close on it. After deregistration, lookup for the same zone shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Lookup returns ErrNotFound for an absent zone
requirements.text: Registry::lookup for a zone with no registered controller shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registry::close is idempotent
requirements.text: Registry::close shall be safe to call multiple times. Every call after the first shall succeed without side effects.

requirements.title: Controllers returns all currently registered controllers
requirements.text: Registry::controllers shall return exactly the set of controllers currently registered, with no duplicates and no omissions.

requirements.title: Register rejected after Registry::close
requirements.text: Registry::register_ctrl called after Registry::close shall return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Deregister returns ErrNotFound for a zone that was never registered
requirements.text: Registry::deregister for a zone with no registered controller shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registered controller is immediately retrievable via lookup
requirements.text: After a successful Registry::register_ctrl call, Registry::lookup for the same zone shall return the registered controller without error.

requirements.title: Registry::close calls close on all registered controllers
requirements.text: Registry::close shall call close on every controller currently registered before returning.

requirements.title: Lookup on a closed Registry returns an error
requirements.text: Registry::lookup called after Registry::close shall return a non-success error_code.

requirements.title: Deregister for an already-deregistered zone returns ErrNotFound
requirements.text: A second call to Registry::deregister for a zone that was already deregistered shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registry::lookup returns ErrClosed when called on a closed registry
requirements.text: Registry::lookup called after Registry::close shall return ErrClosed specifically, not ErrNotFound.
